message:
fix: third-pass audit — propagate serialization errors, fix Netlify query sanitizer

1. **Silent serialization drops**: 8 instances of
   `serde_json::to_value(x).unwrap_or(json!({}))` replaced with
   `.map_err(Error::Json)?` to properly propagate serialization failures
   instead of silently sending empty request bodies.
   Affected: Cloudflare (2), Netlify (3), PayPal (3).

2. **Netlify sanitize_query_param wrong error variant**: Used
   `NetlifyError::Api` for input validation, fixed to
   `NetlifyError::InvalidInput`.

All 653 tests pass across 10 connectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
